name: HANOVER INSURANCE GROUP, INC.
business: We provide property and casualty insurance products and services to small and mid-sized businesses and individuals through independent agents.

exposures.sentence: Primary business operations include insurance products and services currently provided through four reporting segments: Core Commercial, Specialty, Personal Lines and Other.
We maintain an enterprise-wide cybersecurity program that provides governance, structure, and executive oversight for identifying, assessing, and managing cybersecurity risks.
